title: QoLculator
description: Adds a calculator to minecraft's chat for your QoL
body:
# **Qolculator, your new best friend**

**Qolculator adds a variety of commands based around math to your in-game chats. It can be used to store numbers through variables, convert numbers to stack/block format, and perform basic math including addition, multiplication, division, exponents, and subtraction.**

**Qolculator aims to replace the need to open Google for quick calculations related to resource management by implementing an easy-and-fast "type-and-get-result" system similar to Google’s. Qolculator is a client-side mod, meaning you can use it on all your favorite servers!**

### **Command list:**
> - **;=help** — Opens the help page
>   
> - **;=clear <variable>** — Resets a variable
>   
> - **;=clear all** — Resets all variables
>   
> - **;=<variable> <value>** — Sets the specified variable to the specified value
> > -    ▶ Example usage: ;=b 23 — sets b to 23
> > -    ⚠ Variable names can only be one lowercase letter (a–z)
> 
>   
> - **;=<variable>** — Returns the specified variable’s value
>   
> - **;=list** — Lists all variables and their corresponding values
>   
> - **;=<operation>** — Calculates the specified operation
> > -    ▶ Example usage: ;=2*(2+3) — returns 10
> > -    ▶ Example usage: ;=18/3^2 — returns 2
> > -    ▶ Example usage: ;=5-c — if c=10, this returns -5
> 
>   
> - **;=stack** <amount> — Converts the number into stacks and blocks
> > -    ▶ Example usage: ;=stack 72 — returns 1⛁ 8⛀


```
Note: When you send a command, only you will be able to see the result, and the command will not be sent in chat.
```
